channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Influencers are tagging the UnitedHealthcare CEO murder suspect Luigi Mangione for clout
item.description: Is there a more creative way to clout-chase than to tag an alleged assassin in your Instagram photo dump? For some aspiring influencers, every view counts, it seems.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Google unveils Gemini 2.0 AI model for agentic era
item.description: Emphasizing a new AI model for the agentic era, Google has introduced Gemini 2.0, which the company calls its most capable model yet. Announced December 11, the Gemini 2.0 Flash experimental model will be available to all Gemini users.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Should you ditch unencrypted messaging apps? Here's what experts say about the FBI's warning
item.description: The FBI recently warned Americans to strictly use encrypted messaging apps to keep their communications secure.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How philosopher Shannon Vallor delivered the year’s best critique of AI
item.description: A few years ago, Shannon Vallor found herself in front of Cloud Gate, Anish Kapoor’s hulking mercury drop of a sculpture, better known as the Bean, in Chicago’s Millennium Park. Staring into its shiny mirrored surface, she noticed something.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence helping USDA improve cybersecurity responses
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, the more data you have, the easier it is to identify anomalies and stop adversaries. The post Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence helping USDA improve cybersecurity responses first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Rose Wang says Bluesky is so much more than an X clone
item.description: A huge shift in social media is underway: People are leaving X while millions have flocked to Bluesky, a new upstart powered by a tiny 20-person team. Bluesky’s COO, Rose Wang, addresses this inflection point as dissatisfaction with major platforms continues to grow.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: Federal bankruptcy judge rules against sale of Alex Jones Infowars to The Onion
item.description: A federal bankruptcy judge denied the sale of Alex Jones’s Infowars to The Onion on Wednesday, citing a lack of transparency in the auction process as the reason for rejecting it. “I don’t think anyone acted in bad faith here.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Supreme Court dismisses Nvidia’s appeal in securities lawsuit
item.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday dismissed an appeal from Nvidia in a securities lawsuit against the chipmaking giant, allowing the case to move forward. The court dismissed the appeal as “improvidently granted” in an unsigned, one-sentence opinion without explanation.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: GM shuts down robotaxi project to focus on autonomous vehicles
item.description: General Motors (GM) said Tuesday that it will no longer fund the development of robotaxis and instead focus on creating fully autonomous personal vehicles. Cruise, GM’s self-driving car subsidiary, will be combined with the automaker’s own team to form a single unit focused on autonomous driving.
item.dc:creator: The Hill

item.title: California defense contractors optimistic Trump administration could create jobs
item.description: The Reagan National Defense Survey done just after the November election found that 79% of those surveyed want the U.S. to spend more on national defense.
item.dc:creator: Erika I. Ritchie, The Mercury News

item.title: AI in the workplace is forcing younger tech workers to rethink their career paths
item.description: Entry-level workers increasingly fear job loss or significant changes to their careers due to automation made possible by generative AI (genAI).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft to launch zero water consumption cooling for future data centers
item.description: Microsoft has introduced a new design for data centers to optimize artificial intelligence (AI) workloads, implementing a cooling system that it claims will consume zero water.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump taps FTC Commissioner Andrew Ferguson to chair agency
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Andrew Ferguson, a commissioner at the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), as the next head of the independent agency.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Why Meta shareholders are seeking sanctions for former COO Sheryl Sandberg
item.description: Attorneys for Meta shareholders asked a Delaware judge Monday to sanction the company’s former Chief Operating Officer Sheryl Sandberg and fellow Facebook board member and current White House chief of staff Jeff Zients for deleting emails related to the Cambridge Analytica privacy scandal, despite b
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Atmospheric river and potential bomb cyclone will bring messy, dangerous weather to East Coast
item.description: The East Coast is due for a whiplash-inducing rainy, windy and potentially dangerous stretch of weather.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A hardwired TSA looks to the future with 5G implementation
item.description: At TSA most of their critical network infrastructure is hardwired. That includes checkpoint equipment and computers operated by the TSOs. The post A hardwired TSA looks to the future with 5G implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Nokia expands data center SONiC support
item.description: Nokia is offering customers an alternative way to set up data center networks by expanding its data center fabric package to support the open-source Software for Open Networking in the Cloud (SONiC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bay Area lawmaker introduces bill requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: “The promise of social media, although real, has turned into a situation where they’re turning our children’s attention into a commodity,” Assemblymember Rebecca Bauer-Kahan, who authored the California bill, said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: U.S. consumers who were tricked into purchases they didn’t want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: Wyatte Grantham-Philips, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Adobe Express is now the default image editor in Box
item.description: Adobe Express is now embedded into Box’s content management application as the default tool for editing images. Express is Adobe’s freemium design app that’s aimed at helping non-designers produce a range of content, such as social media campaign assets, logos or flyers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI Rolls Out Video Creation Tool Sora: A New Era in AI-Generated Content?
item.description: OpenAI's new video creation tool Sora enables users to generate short-length video clips through text prompts.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Network World’s Best of Enterprise Network 2024 award winners
item.description: In many ways, networking is a mature, stable industry, based on established technologies like Wi-Fi and Ethernet, which just celebrated its 50th anniversary.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cato Networks brings IoT, OT support to SASE platform
item.description: Cato Networks today announced new capabilities for its cloud-based service access service edge (SASE) platform that will enable enterprise organizations to more easily manage and secure Internet of Things (IoT) and operational technology (OT) devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: IT at Tokio Marine means continuous learning — and many hats
item.description: The insurance industry is known for being slow and steady, but at Tokio Marine North America Services (TMNAS), a dogged emphasis on growth, diversity of thought, and continuous learning has helped accelerate an IT culture predicated on innovation and career mobility.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Total Quality Logistics: Building a ‘talent destination’ through employee engagement
item.description: Don’t talk about industry slowdowns to Total Quality Logistics (TQL), which has made its largest-ever technology investments over the past three years to bring greater agility and resilience to the business.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Databricks unveils synthetic data generation API to help evaluate agents faster
item.description: As enterprise demand for building multi-agent systems continues to grow, data infrastructure services providing firm, Databricks, is updating its Mosaic AI Agent Evaluation module with a new synthetic data generation API that will help enterprises evaluate agents faster.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to build better AI chatbots
item.description: At Campfire, we launched a consumer AI chat product called Cozy Friends on Steam and mobile on October 12. Imagine Animal Crossing or The Sims with AI agents. In the first 30 days, users exchanged more than 1.7M messages with our AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 5G never delivered for cloud computing
item.description: I recall this as if it was yesterday. I entered the conference room to talk about cloud computing and 5G. I gave this type of presentation often a few years ago. The executives were excited about 5G’s potential. I took a deep breath, knowing I had to voice my concerns.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Extreme looks to tame complexity with AI-powered platform for network and security management
item.description: Extreme Networks is rolling out an AI-infused networking platform that aims to help enterprise customers integrate, manage and automate a broad range of network and security technologies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scale smarter, not harder: How network-as-a-service (NaaS) is transforming mid-market IT
item.description: Mid-market organizations often find themselves in a difficult position: they need to scale rapidly and digitally transform their businesses without huge financial, technological and human resources at their disposal.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon seals Mountain View deal as South Bay office sector perks up
item.description: Amazon has struck a deal to rent a big office building in Mountain View in a hopeful sign of an office market rebound.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX
item.description: Michelyne LeBlanc, the deputy CIO of the Defense Commissary Agency, said the move to zero trust is all about ensuring customer confidence in its services. The post Defense Commissary Agency striving to balance cyber, CX first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Reddit rolls out AI search feature
item.description: Reddit has launched a new AI search feature for its site. The test rollout of Reddit Answers, launched Monday, will allow users to have their questions answered through a new conversational interface.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: Struggling to hear TV dialogue? Try these simple fixes
item.description: If it sounds like actors on your TV are speaking in whispers, there's a way to fix it to make your TV audio sound better. The CyberGuy has several tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
